{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322104205730BF49CD0F9891D3C0E"}"},"total":29},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619250033041130264","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"必须五星 作者文笔很好 把虹霞和高斯的情谊写的明明白白 日蚀的登场也是引用武藏小时候遇到高斯时候的画面 而且依旧奥文惯例地狱副本这一块 还有怪兽娘元素 而且正义姐和白龙应该在70章左右就出来了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773997715,"group_id":"7607480024819567641","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N511DBRFptZGtSdiFlS+Xn/ILZjQ+mjHJlntEqSFv562","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/20af20d8a92b4334a1eea97f676a5080~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705274&x-signature=ynDXxQmi2h1W27Acq9444s6NnZw%3D","user_id":"3852293171851512","user_name":"东映还我的切刚好不好"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3852293171851512","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1739197324,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7607480024819567641","book_info":{"abstract":"【奥特精神】【勇者】【治愈】【高斯奥特曼】【相似却不同的平行宇宙】
来自蓝星的五好少年虹霞只是因为不小心开了个门，就来到了一个有怪兽，有宇宙人，还有邪恶侵略者，就是没有奥特曼的混乱宇宙中。
而他，只是一个意外与平行世界的高斯奥特曼一心同体的普通人。
欧布猛斯王，卡欧斯黑暗（特别版），吉尔巴里斯，萨乌鲁斯...
看着眼前如狼似虎的敌人，自己却只有最基本的月神和日冕形态以及还算可靠的队友，虹霞颤巍巍地指了指自己。
“我也要成为勇者吗？”
诸星团：“对于深爱着人类这件事，我全然无悔。”
希卡利（勇气之铠）：“这样就好，战斗的意义不应是仇恨，为了守护而战斗吧。”
白龙：“真正的正义（justice)到底是什么，我不会再动摇了！”
